returns._0: True if newX * newY >= oldX * oldY

returns.fee: Fee deducted from amountIn (in input token units)

params.reserveIn: Reserve of the token being sold
params.reserveOut: Reserve of the token being bought

checkInvariant(uint256,uint256,uint256,u.notice: Checks that the constant-product invariant is maintained

getAmountIn(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Computes the input amount required to receive an exact output

getAmountOut(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Computes the output amount given an input amount and reserves

spotPrice(uint256,uint256).notice: Computes the spot price of the output token in 1e18 fixed-point
